_capture_note: Hand-crafted OSV /v1/querybatch response for PyPI/requests@2.27.0 → CVE-2023-32681. Refresh: curl -sS -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' --data '{"queries":[{"package":{"ecosystem":"PyPI","name":"requests"},"version":"2.27.0"}]}' https://api.osv.dev/v1/querybatch

vulns.summary: Unintended leak of Proxy-Authorization header in requests
